3.solution:
A:B=1200:1020=20:17. From time headstart: v_B=180/(17Ã—15/17)=12 m/s, v_A=240/17 m/s.
For C: A's time for 600m=600Ã—17/240=42.5s. C's time=42.5+5.5=48s â†’ v_C=600/48=12.5 m/s.
In 2500m: C faster. When C finishes, B runs 2500Ã—12/12.5=2400m â†’ C beats B by 100m.
Answer: C (100).
